title: APC PDU SNMP Per-Outlet Power Draw Trending
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu" earliest=-7d
| eval amps=tonumber(coalesce(rPDU2OutletMeteredStatusLoad, rPDU2OutletSwitchedStatusLoad, outlet_amps, ""))/10
| eval outlet=coalesce(outlet_id, outletIndex, "")
| timechart span=1h avg(amps) by pdu_name outlet
description: Outlet-level trending attributes growth to specific blades without rack PDUs guessing.
value: Supports chargeback and finds zombie gear drawing idle power.
implementation: (1) Confirm MIB scaling (0.1 A units). (2) Label outlets in DCIM. (3) Alert on step changes after installs.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
